title: GT4 Uncomplications
description: Adds compatibility between Gregtech 4 and Uncomplications
body:
This mod overrides Gregtech 4 changes to the E-net from IC2 to be compatible with Aroma1997's Uncomplications.

While previously Uncomplications would break Gregtech 4 machines from connecting to IC2 cables this mod fixes just that.

This mod is intended for use in the Lost Era Modpack .

All credits goes to Bambam01.
